capabilities.name: Salary structure config
capabilities.verify: salary_structures + salary_structure_components (fixed or pct_of_base, earning/benefit/deduction) + employees.salary_structure_id + manage_salary_structure skill; applied in create_payroll_run (source:"structure" components) (20260708080000). LIVE VERIFIED on rzhj 2026-07-07: 5% bonus (210000) + 50000 allowance landed on the run line exactly.

capabilities.name: Payslip PDF + self-service
capabilities.verify: get_payslip RPC/skill: employer/employee blocks, full component + gross→net breakdown (pension/sick/advance/tax corrections), YTD totals; self-service via employees.user_id=auth.uid() locked to own approved/paid runs; list mode without run id (20260708080000). LIVE VERIFIED 2026-07-07 via gateway.
capabilities.notes: PDF via the portal print view (browser print-to-PDF); a dedicated PDF renderer edge function is not needed for parity.

capabilities.name: Pension contributions
capabilities.verify: apply_pension RPC/skill + payroll_lines.pension_* + run totals (20260613060000); approve_payroll_run posts Dt 7410 / Cr 2950 (20260707170000); ApplyPensionDialog on PayrollPage (draft runs) + pension totals in run row/detail
capabilities.notes: Wired into approve posting + UI 2026-07-07. E2E-verified on live dev via MCP gateway: create run → apply_pension 4.5/2 → approve; journal balanced (Dt 7210+7410+7510 = Cr 2710+2731+2890+2950 = 4,349,441). Särskild löneskatt on pension not posted yet (noted in fn).

capabilities.name: Statutory sick pay
capabilities.verify: calc_sick_pay RPC/skill (pure calc, 20260613060000) + apply_sick_pay RPC/skill wiring it into a draft line (20260707170000); SickDaysDialog per employee line on PayrollPage
capabilities.notes: Wired as idempotent draft-line adjustment + UI 2026-07-07. E2E-verified on live dev via gateway: 35k/mo, 5 sick days → deduction 833,333, sick pay 533,334, karens 133,333; re-run idempotent (no compounding), preserves employee pension deduction, emits re-run-pension reminder note.

capabilities.name: Multi-country payroll
capabilities.verify: payroll_country_profiles (seeded SE/NO/DK/FI/DE) + employees.payroll_country + manage_payroll_country skill; employer social fee per country in create_payroll_run and apply_sick_pay (20260708080000). LIVE VERIFIED 2026-07-07: NO employee computed 14.1% social (628860 on 4460000) vs SE 31.42%.
capabilities.notes: Statutory rate profiles (social fee + default tax + currency); per-employee tax_rate_pct still wins. Full local payslip law per country is out of scope.

capabilities.name: Tax adjustment/correction
capabilities.verify: apply_tax_correction RPC/skill on draft runs: cumulative delta on tax/net + tax_correction_cents + payslip component; survives apply_sick_pay recompute (20260708080000). LIVE VERIFIED 2026-07-07: −38000 refund moved tax 1338000→1300000 and net 3022000→3060000.

capabilities.name: Salary advance/loan
capabilities.verify: salary_advances + manage_salary_advance (grant posts Dt 1610/Cr 1930, cancel reverses); create_payroll_run deducts open advances from net (payroll_lines.advance_deduction_cents, runs.total_advances_cents); approve settles Cr 1610 and marks repaid (20260708080000). LIVE VERIFIED 2026-07-07: 100000 advance deducted and settled, approval JE balanced to 0.

capabilities.name: Year-end tax certification
capabilities.verify: year_end_payroll_summary RPC/skill: per-employee annual gross/benefits/tax withheld/social/pension/net over approved+paid runs (KU-style data set) (20260708080000). LIVE VERIFIED 2026-07-07 via gateway.

capabilities.name: Tax-authority integration
capabilities.verify: generate_agi RPC (skill generate_agi_export): monthly AGI XML (HU FK487/FK497 + IU FK215/FK011/FK001 per employee, Skatteverket namespaces) from approved/paid runs; org number from site_settings (20260708080000). LIVE VERIFIED 2026-07-07: well-formed XML with correct whole-SEK totals.
capabilities.notes: File-based declaration (upload via Skatteverket filöverföring); no direct API submission — same integration level Odoo ships for most l10n payroll.
